title: selenipedium × finetianum
intro: Selenipedium × finetianum, also known as Finet's selenipedium, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium ishibeiense. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Selenipedium × finetianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditional herbal preparations involving Selenipedium × finetianum include tea infusions and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
